inputs.label: Loan Amount
inputs.businessContext: Principal amount borrowed. Standard financial practice per GAAP.

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual nominal interest rate. Based on market rates and lender terms.

inputs.label: Loan Term (Months)
inputs.businessContext: Duration of loan in months. Common terms: 12, 24, 36, 48, 60, 120, 240, 360.

inputs.label: Payment Frequency
inputs.businessContext: How often payments are made. Affects compounding and total interest.

inputs.label: Extra Payment per Period
inputs.businessContext: Additional principal payment each period to reduce loan term and interest.

inputs.label: Compounding Frequency
inputs.businessContext: How often interest is compounded. Affects effective interest rate.

rules: if paymentFrequency == 'biweekly' then loanTermMonths must be multiple of 0.5? (not enforced, but term in months is approximate)

thresholds.extraPayment > loanAmount * 0.1: Extra payment exceeds 10% of loan amount

formulas.periodicInterestRate: annualInterestRate / 100 / (12 if paymentFrequency == 'monthly' else 26 if paymentFrequency == 'biweekly' else 52)
formulas.numberOfPayments: loanTermMonths * (1 if paymentFrequency == 'monthly' else 26/12 if paymentFrequency == 'biweekly' else 52/12)
formulas.effectiveAnnualRate: (1 + periodicInterestRate)^(12 if paymentFrequency == 'monthly' else 26 if paymentFrequency == 'biweekly' else 52) - 1

suggestedActions: Consider making extra payments to reduce total interest
Shorten loan term to save on interest
outputs.dataConfidenceAdjusted: paymentPerPeriod * (1 + (1 - dataConfidence) * 0.05) if dataConfidence input exists else paymentPerPeriod
